mapper.sql: SELECT a.id, a.game_partition_id, a.guild_name, a.description, a.recruit_requirement, a.applicant_id, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.reviewer_id, a.review_time, a.created_at, p.game_name as game_partition_name, u.nick_name as applicant_name, ru.nick_name as reviewer_name FROM guild_create_application a LEFT JOIN game_partition p ON a.game_partition_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.applicant_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON a.reviewer_id = ru.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guild_create_application (game_partition_id, guild_name, description, recruit_requirement, applicant_id, status) VALUES (#{gamePartitionId}, #{guildName}, #{description}, #{recruitRequirement}, #{applicantId}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_create_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
